headline: Why Goldman Suddenly Turned Neutral on EPAM Systems, Inc. (EPAM)
summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE:EPAM) is among the best high-return technology stocks to buy now. On May 8, Goldman Sachs significantly cut the price target on EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE:EPAM) to $110 from $215 and downgraded the stock from Buy to Neutral. According to the firm, the company is experiencing stronger-than-expected pressures on discretionary spending, which […]
